blocks.content: The fourth round went to Shirone's team.
The Scatter Movement was a strategic weapon, and Iruki's Cancellation completely blocked Suavi.
The current score was 3 to 1.
Shirone's team had the upper hand, and unless there were any significant changes, the current momentum seemed likely to continue.

blocks.speaker: Student
blocks.content: Huh? The fourth round just ended?
Students were coming out of the third battlefield.
Canis and Arin were among them.
Their opponent was Fermi's team, and the result was a 1 to 5 loss for Canis and Arin's team.
It was a disappointing result for Canis and Arin, but maintaining their extreme dislike for cooperating with others meant they had to accept this kind of evaluation.
Moreover, even with the best team, there was no guarantee of victory against Fermi's team, so neither of them looked particularly disheartened.

blocks.speaker: Fermi
blocks.content: Hmm, 3 to 1.
Shirone's team did better than expected.
Initially, it seemed like it would be a close match.
Fermi thought similarly.
However, it was just a matter of probability, and there was always the possibility of other variables arising.

blocks.speaker: Fermi
blocks.content: The insight to create variables. That's Shirone.

blocks.speaker: Fermi
blocks.content: If they get just one more point, this will likely be over.
Saying this, Fermi looked at Screamer's team.

blocks.speaker: Fermi
blocks.content: 'Of course, it won't end like this.'
Fermi's lips twisted into a wicked smile.
Although the fourth round had ended, Suavi was still staring at Iruki from Shirone's team's camp.

blocks.speaker: Suavi
blocks.content: 'Merco Dine Iruki...' If it weren't for the top-tier overpowered magic called Cancellation used by the Servant Syndrome, no one at the student level could have frustrated her this much.
Iruki, with his hands behind his back, calmly accepted Suavi's gaze.

blocks.speaker: Iruki
blocks.content: 'She must feel very wronged.'
He didn't want to provoke her.
After all, in terms of calculation speed, everyone in the graduating class was beneath him.
To beat a Servant, you need intuition, not calculation.
The highest level of intuition, on par with a Servant.

blocks.speaker: Screamer
blocks.content: Suavi, let's go.
At Screamer's call, Suavi finally turned around.

blocks.speaker: Suavi
blocks.content: A fire burned inside her.

blocks.speaker: Suavi
blocks.content: She knew there were many strong people in the graduating class and had failed last year's graduation exam.

blocks.speaker: Suavi
blocks.content: But having her major nullified was a completely different kind of humiliation.
Screamer gathered his team and spoke.

blocks.speaker: Screamer
blocks.content: Let's stick together.

blocks.speaker: Screamer
blocks.content: We'll break through the central line in the shortest distance.

blocks.speaker: Screamer
blocks.content: Pony, you go on the offensive now.

blocks.speaker: Screamer
blocks.content: If we lose this round, a comeback will be nearly impossible.

blocks.speaker: Pony
blocks.content: No.

blocks.speaker: Pony
blocks.content: Pony, keep using Refresh.

blocks.speaker: Suavi
blocks.content: This time, I'll do it right.
Screamer tilted his head.

blocks.speaker: Screamer
blocks.content: 'Hmm, she's really pissed off?'
As a martial artist, Screamer had no complaints.

blocks.speaker: Screamer
blocks.content: He couldn't guess how to counter Cancellation, but since Suavi said she was fine, he decided to trust her.

blocks.speaker: Screamer
blocks.content: Alright, let's consider this the final round.

blocks.speaker: Screamer
blocks.content: I'll show them what I'm made of.
As soon as the fifth round started, Screamer's team, except for the guard, gathered on the central line.
It was a rush-and-rush tactic with a high comeback rate.
As the combat package hit Screamer, Iruki twitched his eyes and sent out a detached Spirit Zone.
Bang! Bang bang bang bang bang!
At that moment, buff effects exploded in succession.
The combat package was hitting all team members except the guard.

blocks.speaker: Iruki
blocks.content: 'If it's Cancellation anyway...'
Iruki blinked in surprise, but Suavi gritted her teeth and glared at him even more.

blocks.speaker: Suavi
blocks.content: 'How about this? Can you still do it?'
The number of reserved cores in her mind was a whopping 137.

blocks.speaker: Suavi
blocks.content: That was the accumulated number in a situation where eight were being consumed per second.
Tikitikitakitoki tok tok tikitaki tak tak tikitokitakitok!

blocks.speaker: Screamer
blocks.content: Hahaha! Yes! This is it!
Filled with power, Screamer charged into the center of Shirone's team and struck all four members repeatedly.
Then, he took a bold finishing stance like in the first round.

blocks.speaker: Screamer
blocks.content: Kyaaaaaa!
Screamer's team's morale soared.

blocks.speaker: Screamer
blocks.content: Feeling Suavi's determination, the wingers also began to reveal their hidden cards.

blocks.speaker: Screamer
blocks.content: 'We just need to cut Shirone.'
Luman slowly raised his hands as if drawing energy from his soles.

blocks.speaker: Luman
blocks.content: 'Everyone hates me.'

blocks.speaker: Luman
blocks.content: But he didn't care.
For humans, harmony is just a second-best option born from the fear of distrust.
If he could control it, others' feelings didn't matter.

blocks.speaker: Luman
blocks.content: 'Yes, I am the king of crowd control (self-proclaimed).'
Luman's cheeks quivered, his whites showed, and his mouth stretched to his ears.

blocks.speaker: Luman
blocks.content: I am the king of the battlefield!
Rumble!
The ground, swirling in a spiral, turned mushy like mud and pulled Shirone down.
Then it solidified into rock, gripping his waist tightly and not letting go.

blocks.speaker: Screamer
blocks.content: Now!
As Screamer charged, Suavi's concentration soared to its highest level.

blocks.speaker: Suavi
blocks.content: Countless cores stormed through her mind like a hurricane.

blocks.speaker: Suavi
blocks.content: It was the realm of intuition beyond calculation, and every time a core hit another, her tongue flicked rapidly.
Tikitakitokitakitakitakitokitakitokitakitikitaki!
Reserved cores: 372.

blocks.speaker: Iruki
blocks.content: 'I'm glad I joined the graduating class.'

blocks.speaker: Iruki
blocks.content: He had never wanted to beat someone before.

blocks.speaker: Iruki
blocks.content: But now he vaguely understood.

blocks.speaker: Iruki
blocks.content: He hated losing even more.

blocks.speaker: Iruki
blocks.content: 'You're amazing, Suavi.'

blocks.speaker: Iruki
blocks.content: Countless talents claimed their specialties like stars.

blocks.speaker: Iruki
blocks.content: 'You must have practiced every day. To hold onto your drifting mind, biting your hand every night, you must have trained hard.'
Iruki lowered his stance and clenched his fists.

blocks.speaker: Iruki
blocks.content: It was his way of responding to Suavi's sincerity.

blocks.speaker: Iruki
blocks.content: 'This will shorten my lifespan, but...'
Since entering the magic school, this was the third time.
After the bloody battle with Nade in the rain six years ago and getting excited by Canis's provocation in the infirmary hallway a year ago.

blocks.speaker: Iruki
blocks.content: His brain cells would be destroyed, but did it matter?
It was a matter of pride for Shirone's faction, beyond the battle.

blocks.speaker: Iruki
blocks.content: 'You will be a great magician. But not now. Only two people in the world can stop me. One is Shirone, and the other is...'
Sparks flew in Iruki's pupils.

blocks.speaker: Iruki
blocks.content: It was a phenomenon where electricity generated in the cerebral cortex was projected onto the retina.

blocks.speaker: Iruki
blocks.content: 'It's me, Merco Dine Iruki!'
In the virtual image in Iruki's mind, data amounting to 100 million joules per second surged like a tornado.
As the information processing capacity to handle all events in a city at once was reached, the double Spirit Zone flew through Screamer's team at an astonishing speed, canceling all buffs.

blocks.speaker: Suavi
blocks.content: Unbelievable...
Suavi was stunned.
The overwhelming calculation speed drained her will to fight.
Boom boom boom boom boom!
Shirone, who destroyed the Spiral Hunter with Radiance, led his team in a counterattack.
With the buffs gone, Screamer's team weakened rapidly and was soon on the defensive.

blocks.speaker: Aider
blocks.content: Hah, we're losing after all.
Aider sighed.
The downside of the martial artist killer strategy was that there was no Plan B.
If they lost this round, there would be no chance for a comeback.
The youthful look disappeared from Aider's face.
He took out a black-and-white patterned chip and swallowed it.

blocks.speaker: Aider
blocks.content: 'It feels wrong, but does it matter?'
He could give up graduation if he could enjoy it.
No, he couldn't give up graduation.
He had to become a magician to enjoy it even more.
A core was installed in his mind.
According to the dealer, it was a high-level air-type technique called 'Ghost Movement.'
Even without understanding the internal principles, he could cast the spell because it was similar to Shirone's Ataraxia.

blocks.speaker: Aider
blocks.content: Ah, ah...
Aider's eyelids trembled.

blocks.speaker: Aider
blocks.content: The days he had restrained himself from tasting humans.

blocks.speaker: Aider
blocks.content: But now, there was no need for that.
With the deal made, his graduation was practically guaranteed.

blocks.speaker: Aider
blocks.content: Hahahahaha!
Aider threw off his mask and flew straight into Shirone's camp.
It was classified as a reverse position tactic, but it wasn't agreed upon with Screamer's team.
While his allies looked on in astonishment, Shirone's team intercepted with their respective spells.
Zap!
The first to reach him was the Photon Cannon.
But just before being shot down, Aider's movements twisted bizarrely.
Like a willow branch, his trajectory wavered, dodging all the Photon Cannons.

blocks.speaker: Dorothy
blocks.content: Huh? Ghost Movement?
Dorothy, watching from outside the battlefield, noticed.
It wasn't a spell a student could use.
But Aider's movements couldn't be explained without the AT algorithm.
Did he join Fermi?
It was hard to believe he had mastered it in just a few months.
The AT algorithm, which controlled turbulence to automatically evade approaching objects, was a core even professionals struggled with.
Nothing could stop Aider.
Reaching the hill, he ran towards the flag.
But contrary to everyone's expectations, Aider targeted Maya instead of the flag.
Wham!
A powerful kick twisted Maya's jaw, sending her rolling down the hill.

blocks.speaker: Aider
blocks.content: What...!
Aider sat on Maya's stomach.

blocks.speaker: Aider
blocks.content: Sis, this might hurt a bit.

blocks.speaker: Aider
blocks.content: But bear with it, okay?
Aider's fists pounded on Maya.
Ahaha! This is so fun, I'm going crazy!
A senseless laugh escaped his lips.
Seeing her terrified expression, a rush of pleasure overwhelmed his reason.
Aider's pounding fists, raised like a gorilla's, made him look inhuman.
His eyes showed the whites, and drool dripped from his gaping mouth.
His teammates, as well as the students watching from outside, were speechless at his brutality.

blocks.speaker: Arin
blocks.content: Remember the Truth or Dare game when you asked me a question?

blocks.speaker: Arin
blocks.content: The ugliest person?

blocks.speaker: Arin
blocks.content: At first, I was puzzled.

blocks.speaker: Arin
blocks.content: I can't distinguish the shapes of objects.

blocks.speaker: Arin
blocks.content: I chose Luman at the time, but the most intense first impression was Aider.

blocks.speaker: Arin
blocks.content: According to the mental classification, he's 'evil.'

blocks.speaker: Canis
blocks.content: Only those who understand evil can act good.

blocks.speaker: Canis
blocks.content: That's the law of good and evil.

blocks.speaker: Canis
blocks.content: From beginning to end, all that kid wants is to torment others.

blocks.speaker: Canis
blocks.content: That's the law of good and evil.

blocks.speaker: Canis
blocks.content: From beginning to end, all that kid wants is to torment others.

blocks.speaker: Canis
blocks.content: Every human in Radum was like Aider.

blocks.speaker: Canis
blocks.content: I asked the question to test you.

blocks.speaker: Canis
blocks.content: When you denied the truth, I acted a bit more.

blocks.speaker: Canis
blocks.content: Yes.

blocks.speaker: Canis
blocks.content: I thought I could use it as a bargaining chip.

blocks.speaker: Canis
blocks.content: But today's first impression was more blatant.

blocks.speaker: Canis
blocks.content: Probably because he joined Fermi's organization.

blocks.speaker: Canis
blocks.content: Your presence must have influenced him.

blocks.speaker: Canis
blocks.content: With a first impression ability user around, he couldn't act for a year.

blocks.speaker: Canis
blocks.content: Anyway, we've lost one of our cards.

blocks.speaker: Canis
blocks.content: There were still dozens of cards left.

blocks.speaker: Canis
blocks.content: It was good to know how much Arin's first impression could pressure the graduating class.

blocks.speaker: Canis
blocks.content: Maya!
Shirone's eyes lit up.
Seeing Maya curled up and being beaten, his mind went blank.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Hehehe! Does it hurt? How much does it hurt? Aren't you mad? You must hate me to death, right?
Aider swung his fists with unfocused eyes.
He didn't care about Shirone's team rushing in from all directions.
With Ghost Movement, nothing could hit him.
Zap!
Blue electricity flashed before Aider's eyes.
The AT algorithm activated late, pushing his body over 10 meters away.
Nade's face, scratching with his nails, remained on his retina.
When he came to his senses, he was already at the bottom of the hill.

blocks.speaker: Aider
blocks.content: Fear mixed with the ecstasy on Aider's face.

blocks.speaker: Aider
blocks.content: 'What was that? What did I just see?'

blocks.speaker: Aider
blocks.content: He thought he saw Nade's face, but he couldn't understand what it was.

blocks.speaker: Aider
blocks.content: He realized one of his legs was trembling like a dog's.

blocks.speaker: Aider
blocks.content: 'Am I scared? Me?'
Nade, the first to arrive, blocked Maya.
The face he had when he swung his hand to kill was fragmented and only partially remained.

blocks.speaker: Nade
blocks.content: Screamer, the flag.

blocks.speaker: Pony
blocks.content: Ah...
At Pony's words, Screamer snapped out of it and hurriedly ran to pull out the flag.
No one cared.
Shirone approached Maya.
Seeing her still trembling and curled up, his heart broke.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Maya...
Maya was never suited to be a magician.
Her talent for entering the Spirit Zone should be used elsewhere.
She was an artist who moved people's hearts and a genius singer.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Maya, get up.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: We're still in the evaluation.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: If you get disqualified here, we'll all lose 20 points.
Maya's shoulders twitched.

blocks.speaker: Maya
blocks.content: 'I'm... so scared, Shirone. Everyone here, their coldness is terrifying.'

blocks.speaker: Maya
blocks.content: She wanted to give up.

blocks.speaker: Maya
blocks.content: She had endured for her tribe and fought for her family, but seeing Aider's eyes, she realized.

blocks.speaker: Maya
blocks.content: This was not where she belonged.

blocks.speaker: Maya
blocks.content: Shirone...
Maya slowly stood up.

blocks.speaker: Maya
blocks.content: I'm fine... I can still fight.
Seeing Maya trying to hold back her tears, Shirone felt tears welling up instead.
He looked at Aider, who was laughing in the enemy camp.
A terrifying rage filled his eyes.
